H:J,AC:AE

Co,Ledger,Crcy,Flex6,PK,GL,GLdesc,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Txt,PC,CC,TP,ProdCode,UWYR,AccYr,ReinName,ReinLoc,BusCat,Contract,CatCode,RiskTerr,Broker,PTF,Stat,TransCode,TTY,Amt4,Amt5,Amt6

Co,Ledger,Crcy,Doc Nbr,PK,GL,GLdesc,Doc Amt - Display,LC Amt - Display,LC2 Amt - Display,Txt,PC,CC,TP,ProdCode,UWYR,AccYr,ReinName,ReinLoc,BusCat,Contract,CatCode,RiskTerr,Broker,PTF,Stat,TransCode,TTY,Doc Amt,LC Amt,LC2 Amt
Ledger, Crcy, substring(GL,1,3)+substring(GL,6,2), Contract,UWYR,TTY
update TransX set BusCat = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = '' and '[version]' like 'y%'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, ProdCode, AccYr, ReinName, ReinLoc, CatCode, Broker, RiskTerr, PTF,Stat,TransCode,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, Flex6) (Select KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, ProdCode, AccYr, ReinName, ReinLoc, CatCode, Broker, RiskTerr, PTF,Stat,TransCode, round(-sum(coalesce(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(coalesce(Amt2,0)),2) as Amt2,  round(-sum(coalesce(Amt3,0)),2) as Amt3, 'pass1' as Flex6 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, ProdCode, AccYr, ReinName, ReinLoc, CatCode, Broker, RiskTerr, PTF,Stat,TransCode)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex6 is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0

delete t from TransX t inner join (select * from (Select Ledger, GL, TP, Contract, UWYR, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2,  round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by Ledger, Co, GL, TP, Contract, UWYR) f1 where Amt2 <> 0 or Amt3 = 0) f2 on t.Ledger = f2.Ledger and t.GL = f2.GL and t.TP = f2.TP and t.Contract = f2.Contract and t.UWYR = f2.UWYR

update t set t.Ledger = 'Z004' from TransX t inner join (select * from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'IF') x on x.Crcy = t.Crcy and x.GL = t.GL and x.PC = t.PC and x.TP = t.TP and x.BusCat = t.BusCat and x.Contract = t.Contract and x.UWYR = t.UWYR and x.ProdCode = t.ProdCode and x.Accyr = t.AccYr and x.ReinName = t.ReinName and x.ReinLoc = t.ReinLoc and x.CatCode = t.CatCode and x.Broker = t.Broker and x.RiskTerr = t.RiskTerr and x.PTF = t.PTF and x.Stat = t.Stat and x.TransCode = t.TransCode and x.Amt1 = t.Amt1 and x.Amt2 = t.Amt2 and x.Amt3 = t.Amt3 Where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and t.Ledger = 'UG'

delete t from TransX t inner join (select * from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'Z004') x on x.Crcy = t.Crcy and x.GL = t.GL and x.PC = t.PC and x.TP = t.TP and x.BusCat = t.BusCat and x.Contract = t.Contract and x.UWYR = t.UWYR and x.ProdCode = t.ProdCode and x.Accyr = t.AccYr and x.ReinName = t.ReinName and x.ReinLoc = t.ReinLoc and x.CatCode = t.CatCode and x.Broker = t.Broker and x.RiskTerr = t.RiskTerr and x.PTF = t.PTF and x.Stat = t.Stat and x.TransCode = t.TransCode and x.Amt1 = t.Amt1 and x.Amt2 = t.Amt2 and x.Amt3 = t.Amt3 Where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and t.Ledger = 'IF'

update t set t.Ledger = 'Z003' from TransX t inner join (select * from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'US') x on x.Crcy = t.Crcy and x.GL = t.GL and x.PC = t.PC and x.TP = t.TP and x.BusCat = t.BusCat and x.Contract = t.Contract and x.UWYR = t.UWYR and x.ProdCode = t.ProdCode and x.Accyr = t.AccYr and x.ReinName = t.ReinName and x.ReinLoc = t.ReinLoc and x.CatCode = t.CatCode and x.Broker = t.Broker and x.RiskTerr = t.RiskTerr and x.PTF = t.PTF and x.Stat = t.Stat and x.TransCode = t.TransCode and x.Amt1 = t.Amt1 and x.Amt2 = t.Amt2 and x.Amt3 = t.Amt3 Where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and t.Ledger = 'Z004'

delete t from TransX t inner join (select * from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'Z003') x on x.Crcy = t.Crcy and x.GL = t.GL and x.PC = t.PC and x.TP = t.TP and x.BusCat = t.BusCat and x.Contract = t.Contract and x.UWYR = t.UWYR and x.ProdCode = t.ProdCode and x.Accyr = t.AccYr and x.ReinName = t.ReinName and x.ReinLoc = t.ReinLoc and x.CatCode = t.CatCode and x.Broker = t.Broker and x.RiskTerr = t.RiskTerr and x.PTF = t.PTF and x.Stat = t.Stat and x.TransCode = t.TransCode and x.Amt1 = t.Amt1 and x.Amt2 = t.Amt2 and x.Amt3 = t.Amt3 Where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and t.Ledger = 'US'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, ProdCode, AccYr, ReinName, ReinLoc, CatCode, Broker, RiskTerr, PTF,Stat,TransCode,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, Flex6) (Select KeyID, Ledger, Co, substring(Field1,1,3) + substring(GL,4,4) as GL, Crcy, TP, PC, (case when Field2 = '30' then '30' else BusCat end) as BusCat, Contract, UWYR, ProdCode, AccYr, ReinName, ReinLoc, CatCode, Broker, RiskTerr, PTF,Stat,TransCode, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2,  round(-Amt3,2) as Amt3, Flex6 from TransX inner join Misc_Tables on substring(GL,1,3) = Descr where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'GL offsets' and ID = 'reserves')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, CC, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, ProdCode, AccYr, ReinName, ReinLoc, CatCode, Broker, RiskTerr, PTF,Stat,TransCode,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, Flex6) (Select KeyID, Ledger, Co, '6914000' as GL, Crcy, '' as TP, '' as PC, '1CBU000100' as CC, '' as BusCat, '' as Contract, '' as UWYR, '' as ProdCode, '' as AccYr, '' as ReinName, '' as ReinLoc, '' as CatCode, '' as Broker, '' as RiskTerr, '' as PTF,'' as Stat,'' as TransCode, round(-sum(coalesce(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(coalesce(Amt2,0)),2) as Amt2, round(-sum(coalesce(Amt3,0)),2) as Amt3, '' as Flex6 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Ledger, Co, Crcy)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0
update TransX set PK = 40 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 >=0 and Amt2 >=0 and Amt3 >=0
update TransX set PK = 50 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 <=0 and Amt2 <=0 and Amt3 <=0

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, ProdCode, AccYr, ReinName, ReinLoc, CatCode, Broker, RiskTerr, PTF,Stat,TransCode,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Ledger, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, ProdCode, AccYr, ReinName, ReinLoc, CatCode, Broker, RiskTerr, PTF,Stat,TransCode, Amt1, Amt2,  Amt3, '99' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL)

update TransX set Amt1 = (case when Amt1 > 0 then Amt1 else 0 end), Amt2 = (case when Amt2 > 0 then Amt2 else 0 end), Amt3 = (case when Amt3 > 0 then Amt3 else 0 end), PK = '40' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '99'

update TransX set Amt1 = (case when Amt1 < 0 then Amt1 else 0 end), Amt2 = (case when Amt2 < 0 then Amt2 else 0 end), Amt3 = (case when Amt3 < 0 then Amt3 else 0 end), PK = '50' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL
update TransX set TTY = '822' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,2) in ('14','20')
update TransX set TTY = '806' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,3) in ('131','132','148','161','221','231','241')
update TransX set TTY = '832' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,3) in ('151','211')
update TransX set TTY = '841' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,3) in ('181','287')
update TransX set TransCode = 'T0012' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,3) in ('411')
update TransX set CatCode = '''' + CatCode from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and CatCode like '0%'
update TransX set ProdCode = 'UNKNOWN' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,3) in ('547') and ProdCode = ''
update TransX set RiskTerr = 'UNKN' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,3) in ('547') and RiskTerr = ''
update TransX set ReinLoc = 'UNKN' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,3) in ('547') and ReinLoc = ''
update TransX set Amt4 = ABS(Amt1), Amt5 = ABS(Amt2), Amt6 = ABS(Amt3) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex6 = '', Txt = 'Canada Zero Doc Clr' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
